title: Steel Dynamics (STLD) Sees Solid Q2 Steel Operation Earnings
text: Steel Dynamics (STLD) expects improved second-quarter earnings, with stronger profitability in steel operations and steady earnings in metals recycling.

title: Markets Ended the Day Lower, but Up for the Week on Inflation, Fed Optimism
text: Markets closed lower for the day, higher for the week on lower inflation, expectations the Fed may be pause or halt interest rate hikes.

title: Markets Little Changed Midday but on Track for Weekly Gains Heading into Holiday
text: U.S. equities were little changed at midday on Friday, June 16, 2023, but on track for a winning week heading into the long holiday weekend.

title: Steel Dynamics (STLD) Crossed Above the 50-Day Moving Average: What That Means for Investors
text: Steel Dynamics (STLD) reached a significant support level, and could be a good pick for investors from a technical perspective. Recently, STLD broke through the 50-day moving average, which suggests a short-term bullish trend.

title: This Steel Company Is Way Ahead of the Competition on This Key Metric
text: One of the biggest problems facing a steel company is the huge cost of running steel mills. A key metric to watch with steel mills is the utilization rate.
